title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 15 - 2017: Boulderome Roads in Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual daily vlog from Boulder on February 15, 2017. He talks about organizing files on his computer, briefly explains the background scenery (Roman roads of Italy as context for a map or project), and describes spending the day shampooing a rug at his mom's house — the belt broke and he plans to get it replaced in Denver the next day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Has been neglecting life admin by diving into new things and is now catching up
Committed to getting the rug perfectly clean before selling it
